when_to_use: No-code in-app product tours without engineering involvement
Onboarding checklist and tooltip flows for SaaS products

pros: Fastest no-code builder in this category
NPS and checklists included, not bolted on

review.verdict: Top pick for web SaaS onboarding — clean, fast, PM-friendly; watch post-acquisition roadmap.
review.best_for: B2B SaaS PMs shipping onboarding flows without engineering
review.not_for: Mobile apps or teams needing deep experimentation
